signal: AI Feed 采集 (fa1c5a67) timed out at 600s on 18:30 CST run — post-split collection-only job.
notes: CONVERGED: 10+ clean runs post-timeout-increase (200-281s, all within 900s budget).

signal: cron-best-practices.md model table stale after batch migration.

Feed scoring subagent invented own 0-100 four-dimension framework (技术创新/实用/影响力/时效) instead of SKILL.md's three-dimension weighted system (信息增量 35% + 内容质量 35% + 实用价值 30%). Output format also wrong (not BEGIN_JSON/END_JSON).
action: Added anti-hallucination guard to feed-collector SKILL.md v1.12.1: explicit constraint that subagent MUST use only the three named dimensions from SKILL.md, with mandatory scoreBreakdown format. Also added rejection rule: main agent must reject non-conforming subagent output.

signal: Cron prompt vs SKILL.md contradiction pattern: v1.12.0 Tier removal exposed that cron prompt had stale 'prioritize Tier 1+2, skip Tier 3-5' instructions contradicting SKILL.md. Agent executes cron prompt over SKILL.md, so stale prompts override correct skill docs.
action: Added 'Cron Prompt ↔ SKILL.md Sync Rules' guardrail to cron-best-practices.md: 4-point checklist for post-SKILL.md-update prompt review. Principle: cron prompt accuracy is MORE critical than SKILL.md because it's the direct input.
